case_title: FO 1029 GEARY STREET PROPERTY LLC VS. BARBARA DE SOUZA LHAMAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FO 1029 GEARY STREET PROPERTY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LHAMAS, BARBARA DE SOUZA LIESENFELD, OLIVER DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1029 GEARY STREET APT B5 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO , LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70167852)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70167852) AS TO DEFENDANT LHAMAS, BARBARA DE SOUZA LIESENFELD, OLIVER DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FO 1029 GEARY STREET PROPERTY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LHAMAS, BARBARA DE SOUZA LIESENFELD, OLIVER DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; ORDER TO POST & MAIL; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 70071923), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FO 1029 GEARY STREET PROPERTY LLC SERVED MAY-18-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT LIESENFELD, OLIVER

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LHAMAS, BARBARA DE SOUZA LIESENFELD, OLIVER DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; ORDER TO POST & MAIL; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 70164438), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FO 1029 GEARY STREET PROPERTY LLC SERVED MAY-18-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE
